title: Problem 1 (Question 3 in [5])
statement_text: Is it true that $\chi'_c(G) \leq \Delta + 1$ for each graph $G$ of maximum degree $\Delta$?
context_text: The paper proves that $\chi'_c(G) \leq 4$ for subcubic graphs (Theorem 3) via a reachability argument on Kempe chains, but the authors could not push the induction through to answer this question in full generality. The question was originally posed as Question 3 in reference [5].
paper_contribution: Proves the special case $\chi'_c(G) \leq 4$ when $G$ has maximum degree at most 3 (i.e., $\Delta + 1 = 4$), via a reachability lemma for Kempe chains (Theorem 3 and Lemma 7).
notes: Reference [5] is not identified by author name in the provided text; attributed year is unknown. PDF source — math notation cross-checked against prose description and appears clean.
paper_title: A note on connected greedy edge colouring
